title: components
description: Components used in the converter and their circuit connections. Each component is an EAS document (inline or reference).

componentList.description: List of all components in the converter. Each has a name, role, and data (either a full EAS document inline or a string reference to an external EAS file).

netlist.description: Circuit connections between components. Defines nodes and how component pins connect to them.

componentRole.description: Role of the component in the converter circuit

component.description: A component in the converter. Following the MAS pattern (like core shape/material), 'data' can be either a full EAS document inline or a string reference to an external EAS file.

quantity.description: Number of identical units in parallel

pins.description: Pin names for this component, used in netlist connections. If omitted, default pins are inferred from the component type.

data.title: EASDataOrReference
data.description: The component data: either a full EAS document inline, or a string path/URI to an external EAS file (same pattern as MAS core shape/material).

oneOf.description: Path or URI to an external EAS document

usageNotes.description: Engineering notes about this component's usage in the design — selection rationale, derating decisions, cross-reference history, known caveats, lessons learned. Free-form text. Populated by agents (cross-referencer, component-selector, converter-designer) when non-obvious choices are made.

crossReferenceHistory.description: Log of cross-reference substitution attempts for this component slot. Populated by the cross-referencer agent.

date.description: ISO 8601 date of the cross-reference attempt

reason.description: Why the candidate was accepted or rejected

efficiencyDelta.description: Efficiency change in percentage points (positive = improvement)

netlist.description: Circuit connections defining how components are wired together.

nodes.description: Named electrical nodes in the circuit (e.g. 'Vin', 'sw_node', 'out', 'gnd')

connections.description: List of connections: each maps a component pin to a node.

connection.description: A single connection: one pin of one component to one circuit node.

component.description: Reference designator of the component (must match a name in componentList)

node.description: Circuit node this pin connects to (must be in nodes list)
